title: Stew tweaks
description: Rebalances soup and stew recipies, and makes them stackable up to 16!
body:
**Rebalances soup and stew recipies, and makes them stackable up to 16!**

<details>
<summary>Beetroot soup</summary>

![Beetroot soup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86dbed153b462aae88939b321c9f1a74926e29f1.png)

Six beetroots for one soup is very unfair! So now there are three. Additionally, can now be found in plain, savanna and snow villages.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Rabbit stew</summary>

![Rabbit stew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8c8c5846962753ad4abd572c488a8b5c278b13.png)

Rebalanced recipe. You can also use jacket potato and cooked rabbit instead. Additionally, can now be found in desert villages.

_Due to limitations in the functionality of datapacks, rabbit stews obtained from trades with villagers are still not stackable :(_

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mushroom stew</summary>

Can now be found in taiga villages.

_Due to limitations in the functionality of datapacks, mushroom stews obtained from mooshroom are still not stackable :(_

</details>
